backend/main.mo: Main backend canister defining booking logic, role and verification types, and permission gating with maps for bookings and profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old actor state to new profile types with added student role and verification status.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files and components with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one‑line descriptions of all frontend files for quick reference in build planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining OKLCH theme tokens for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level app component handling identity init, registration gate, and rendering authenticated dashboards.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginView.t: Login screen with Internet Identity sign‑in, branding, feature list, and error handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/Registratio: Registration form validating NITJ email, role, and contact details before submitting via useRegisterProfile.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingF: Booking form handling club/event inputs, validation, preview generation, and final booking submission.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingP: Displays booking preview results with warnings, conflicts, event description, and rest‑gap confirmation.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Notif: Fetches and displays user notifications with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Profi: Shows the logged‑in user’s profile, role, email, and verification status with badges and loading/error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Upcom: Renders detailed info for a booking with status badges and allows cancellation if permitted.
UI for listing upcoming bookings with selection, cancellation, and detail view handling.
Toolbar for bulk‑selecting upcoming events, offering clear and cancel actions with loading states.
Defines the main app layout with header, footer, logout handling, and identity display.
frontend/src/components/schedule/TodaySc: Displays today's active bookings in a table with time formatting and loading/error states.
frontend/src/constants/clubs.ts: Exports the list of club names and utilities for retrieving all club options.
frontend/src/constants/venues.ts: Exports the fixed list of venue names used throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useApproveVerificatio: Mutation hook to approve a verification request and refresh relevant queries.
Fetches the current user's profile using the actor, tied to identity readiness.
frontend/src/hooks/useCancelBooking.ts: Mutation hook to cancel a single booking and invalidate related booking queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useCancelBookings.ts: Mutation hook to cancel multiple bookings and refresh booking-related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context using Internet Identity, including login, logout, and identity state.
Determines booking permissions and read‑only status based on the user’s role and verification state.
frontend/src/hooks/usePendingVerificatio: Fetches pending verification requests when an actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreviewBooking.ts: Provides a mutation hook to preview a booking by calling actor.previewBooking with booking details.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegisterProfile.ts: Defines a mutation hook to register a user profile and invalidates registration-status on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegistrationStatus: Fetches whether the current user is registered using actor.isUserRegistered, enabled once actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequestBooking.ts: Creates a booking request mutation and invalidates schedule, bookings, and notifications queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTodaysSchedule.ts: Retrieves today's schedule from the actor with auto-refresh every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpcomingUserBookin: Queries the actor for upcoming user bookings starting from today.
Fetches notification messages for the current user from the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus light/dark theme CSS variables for colors, radius, and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React, wraps the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, and mounts it.
frontend/src/pages/AuthenticatedApp.tsx: Renders the main authenticated UI with tab navigation for booking, upcoming events, profile, and notifications.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Displays the booking form or read-only message plus today's schedule based on user permissions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/src/utils/venueLabel.ts: Normalizes venue codes to standardized labels using a mapping table.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with extended color variables, themes, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Defines current project state for a venue‑booking app, including features, architectural decisions, role rules, and booking/validation logic. Lists required backend checks, UI updates, and the fixed venue set.
